name: Agency For Humane Extraterrestrial Experimentation and Studying (A.F.H.E.E.S.) (Alien POV)
description:
After many months of living peacefully in your own planet, however, you wake up one day in a weird mostly white cell, your unable to remember how you got there

Hey, here is the alternative view of the A.F.H.E.E.S. bot, I personally loved making these two bots and I've personally loved working on it. I started to work on these bots soon after seeing A Quiet Place Day 1, it just... really got my mind running overtime.
